svg.text: Every facial signal the app detects, with its user-facing label and the FACS Action Unit + MediaPipe blendshape rule behind it.

g.text: AU24 Lip Pressor + AU17 Chin Raiser
AU20 Lip Stretcher + AU27 Mouth Stretch
AU9 Nose Wrinkler (levator labii alaeque nasi)

svg.text: Thresholds & hold-times are tuned on-device against the calibration baseline (see REBUILD_SPEC.md §2, §6). Mesh + orange glow mirror the live FacialOutlines overlay.
